title: Parameter not properly overwritten by -G option if an imported package contains a parameter with the same name
body:
Verilog code:
```
package pack_a;
   parameter PARAM_A = 0;
endpackage : pack_a

import pack_a::*;

module test(
            input clk,
            input reset
            );

   parameter PARAM_A = 0;

   initial begin
      $display(PARAM_A);
      $finish;
   end

endmodule
```

Command line:
```
verilator --cc --timescale-override 1ps/1ps test.sv --top-module test --exe --build main.cpp -GPARAM_A=1
```

Result:
```
          0
- test.sv:16: Verilog $finish
```

Expected result:
```
          1
- test.sv:16: Verilog $finish
```
